heading: INCENTIVE AID
operative_text: A consolidated district under this subchapter is entitled to incentive aid under Subchapter G, Chapter 13.
_note: Subsections (a) and (c) were repealed by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 806 (H.B. 1525), Sec. 48(a)(5), eff. September 1, 2021. Only subsection (b) remains operative.
